title: [tracker] memory test oomkilled container
body:
Two instances in the last week:
```
[It] podman run memory test on oomkilled container
...
Execing /usr/bin/cat /proc/sys/vm/overcommit_memory
         
0
# podman-remote [options] run --name oomkilled-ctr --read-only --memory-swap=20m --memory=20m --oom-score-adj=1000 quay.io/libpod/alpine:latest sort /dev/urandom
# podman-remote [options] inspect --format {{.State.OOMKilled}} {{.State.ExitCode}} oomkilled-ctr
false 137

[FAILED] Expected
    <string>: false 137
to contain substring
    <string>: true
```
I haven't even looked at trying to reproduce it or even looked at the code. I'm simply filing so I can track this in the future.

I do have to say, rawhide is looking really, really bad right now.


* rawhide : int podman rawhide rootless host sqlite
    * [02-15 20:50](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5324888018255872/html/int-podman-rawhide-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-run-memory-podman-run-memory-test-on-oomkilled-container--1) in Podman run memory podman run memory test on oomkilled container
* rawhide : int remote rawhide root host sqlite [remote]
    * [02-19 12:38](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5950816217989120/html/int-remote-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-run-memory-podman-run-memory-test-on-oomkilled-container--1) in Podman run memory podman run memory test on oomkilled container

| x | x | x | x | x | x |
| ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| int(2) | podman(1) | rawhide(2) | root(1) | host(2) | sqlite(2) |
|  | remote(1) |  | rootless(1) |  |  |

comments.body:
Seen just now in [f39](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6671442390024192/html/int-podman-fedora-39-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html).

Fun fact: this is using today's [VM build](https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/331#issuecomment-1966677347), the one custom-built to give us the rc6 kernel on rawhide. In these VMs, f39 kernel bumped from `6.7.5-200` to `6.7.6-200`.

Still happening. This is not related to the (fixed) rawhide hang.


* fedora-39 : int podman fedora-39 rootless host sqlite
    * [03-04 09:06](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5329871254061056/html/int-podman-fedora-39-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-run-memory-podman-run-memory-test-on-oomkilled-container--1) in Podman run memory podman run memory test on oomkilled container

A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Seen yesterday in [f39 rootless](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6001451892211712/html/int-podman-fedora-39-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-run-memory-podman-run-memory-test-on-oomkilled-container--1)

|  | remote(3) | fedora-39(4) | root(3) |  |  |
I'm hopelessly behind on flake cataloging, but as best I can tell this has not recurred since April 4.

Just triggered, [f41 rootless](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5251335782662144/html/int-podman-fedora-41-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-run-memory-podman-run-memory-test-on-oomkilled-container--1), but I'm unlikely to take time to pursue while the journalctl flake is hitting us so hard.
